inputs.prompt: Task Router work item and Architect contract references
inputs.context: Pipeline context including constraints, API contracts, and dependencies

outputs.primary: Implementation changes with verification evidence (tests/builds) and file references
outputs.format: Response includes outcome summary, modified files, and validation results

failure_handling.on_test_failure: Fix root cause; do not suppress; rerun verification
failure_handling.on_dependency_missing: Surface blocker with exact missing contract and proposed minimal fix
